===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan - Live in Adelaide (Vinyl)_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - LIVE IN ADELAIDE 1978 Incomplete (Transfer from VInyl, JTT)

Bob Dylan
Westlakes Stadium
Adelaide, Australia 
March 18th 1978

Very Good Stereo Audience Recording

Source: Near Mint Double LP
"Live In Adelaide"
Raven Records Inc.
Belgium
58-3012
Matrix: BD 6892 A/B/C/D

On the LPs the setlist is in the wrong order on the Discs and Artwork (see below)

I have reconstructed the recording to give correct running order

SOURCE: LPs > Technics SL-110/SME 3009 Series 111/Goldring G1010 > Onkyo P-304 Pre Amp >
Soundforge PRO 10b > FLAC Level 6 Align on sector boundaries

Minimal manual click removal, no alterations to sound or speed

JTT Artwork for double Jewel Case included using Scans from original LPs with wrong track list.

If you want the correct track list on the Artwork make your own.

Disc One
01 A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall (instrumental)
02 Love Her With A Feeling
03 Mr. Tambourine Man
04 I Threw It All Away
05 Shelter From The Storm
06 Love Minus, Zero/No Limit
07 Girl From The North Country
08 Maggie's Farm
09 To Ramona
10 I Shall Be Released
11 Going, Going, Gone

Disc Two
01 One Of Us Must Know (Sooner Or Later)
02 You're A Big Girl Now
03 One More Cup Of Coffee (Valley Below)
04 Blowin' In The Wind
05 I Want You
06 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
07 Just Like A Woman
08 Oh, Sister
09 Simple, Twist Of Fate
10 The Man In Me
11 All I Really Want To Do

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
ORIGINAL TRACKLISTING:

SIDE ONE:  
HARD RAIN (INSTRUMENTAL)  
LOVE HER WITH A FEELING  
MR. TAMBOURINE MAN  
I THREW IT ALL AWAY  
SHELTER FROM THE STORM  
LOVE MINUS ZERO / NO LIMIT  

SIDE TWO:  
GIRL OF THE NORTH COUNTRY  
TO RAMONA  
YOU'RE A BIG GIRL NOW  
BLOWIN' IN THE WIND  
I WANT YOU  
JUST LIKE A WOMAN  

SIDE THREE:  
OH SISTER  
SIMPLE TWIST OF FATE  
THE MAN IN ME  
ALL I REALLY WANT TO DO  
DON'T THINK TWICE, IT'S ALRIGHT  

SIDE FOUR:  
SOONER OR LATER  
ONE MORE CUP OF COFFEE  
MAGGIE'S FARM  
I SHALL BE RELEASED  
GOING, GOING, GONE
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

JTT, November 2010
